name: North Lichfield
description:
Including the wards of Chadsmead and Curborough, north Lichfield is within walking distance of the historic city centre and its famous three-spired cathedral.

The green open spaces of Beacon Park are just a stone’s throw away complete with an 18-hole golf course alongside crazy golf for the young at heart; a children's play area, lake, bowling green, tennis courts and scout hut.

The park is used for sporting and other events including the annual Lichfield Bower, Proms in the Park and the Fuse Music Festival. The area is also home to Lichfield hockey and rugby club and Lichfield Archery Club.
